variants.description: Current Psionic local-reference control bound to the same oracle, benchmark receipt, and non-record submission accounting surface.
oracle_guardrails: reuse the same exact val_loss and val_bpb oracle and byte-accounting path
accounting_guardrails: preserve counted component `entrypoint_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `compressed_model_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `shipped_runtime_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `shipped_wrapper_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `required_build_dependency_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
variants.boundary_note: This is the measured local-reference control for research comparison only; it is not a challenge-speed 8xH100 result.

variants.description: Research-only candidate that reuses one or more decoder blocks across recurrent refinement steps or explicit shared-depth passes.
oracle_guardrails: reuse the same exact val_loss and val_bpb oracle and byte-accounting path
accounting_guardrails: preserve counted component `entrypoint_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `compressed_model_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `shipped_runtime_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `shipped_wrapper_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `required_build_dependency_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
variants.boundary_note: Do not compare any shared-depth or recurrent candidate unless it reuses the same oracle digests and the same counted-byte vocabulary as baseline.

variants.description: Research-only candidate that pushes stronger parameter tying across embeddings, blocks, control tensors, or output surfaces while keeping the same scoreboard contract.
oracle_guardrails: reuse the same exact val_loss and val_bpb oracle and byte-accounting path
accounting_guardrails: preserve counted component `entrypoint_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `compressed_model_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `shipped_runtime_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `shipped_wrapper_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `required_build_dependency_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
variants.boundary_note: Parameter-tying experiments are only valid inside this harness when the score still comes from the fixed FineWeb validation oracle and the same package accounting surface.

variants.description: Research-only candidate that widens artifact compression, post-train quantization, or future low-precision export recipes without changing the comparison oracle.
oracle_guardrails: reuse the same exact val_loss and val_bpb oracle and byte-accounting path
accounting_guardrails: preserve counted component `entrypoint_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `compressed_model_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `shipped_runtime_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `shipped_wrapper_code_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
preserve counted component `required_build_dependency_bytes` with explicit bytes accounting
variants.boundary_note: Compression or quantization changes only belong in this harness when they still report the same counted components and final roundtrip metric as the baseline lane.
